The Role

What Forward Deployed Means

Most engineers optimize for code. FDEs optimize for outcomes — which requires speaking both languages fluently.

Technical Depth

Production-grade systems built in-house. Full-stack apps, ETL pipelines, enterprise auth infrastructure, real observability — not prototypes. Platforms.

Customer Proximity

Embedded alongside stakeholders. Understanding their workflow, their constraints, their org chart — before writing a single line of code.

Tangible Outcomes

Measured by what changed in the business: months → days, manual → automated, fragile → observable. Not what shipped — what stuck.

Featured Work

Case Studies

Both engagements were greenfield builds in complex enterprise environments — designed, architected, and shipped solo.

Sphere Entertainment Co. — Las Vegas, NV

Internal Operations Platform

Forward Deployed Engineer · Oct 2025 – Present · Contract → FTE
Executive buy-in secured

Embedded as the sole engineer to modernize internal operations for one of the world's most technically complex live entertainment venues. Scope expanded from legacy audit to a full multi-department platform.

Architecture — 4 repositories
swiki swiki-api etls testing-suite
  • Angular 19 SPA with five role-gated stakeholder portals (Exec, Security, HSE, Guest Services, Dev) using Microsoft Entra ID / Azure AD with MSAL and backend JWT revalidation on every request
  • FastAPI backend on SQL Server with HTTPS enforcement, full ticketing system, ETL health monitoring endpoints, and Docker/docker-compose deployment
  • Python ETL suite extracting, cleansing, and loading operational workforce data from scrapers to SQL Server on automated schedules
  • Centralized QA repo with Playwright E2E coverage across all portals, SAST in GitHub Actions, and Page Object Model architecture
  • Prometheus + Grafana observability stack (3 dashboards) for real-time API and ETL monitoring; nginx reverse proxy with DNS alias and HTTPS
@for (t of ['Angular 19', 'FastAPI', 'SQL Server', 'Python', 'Azure AD / MSAL', 'Docker', 'nginx', 'Playwright', 'Prometheus', 'Grafana', 'GitHub Actions']; track t) { {{ t }} }
Clark County School District — Las Vegas, NV

Internal Web Platform & Data Infrastructure

Data Visualization Analyst II · Nov 2023 – Sep 2025
Months → days

Sole engineer on a ground-up internal platform at one of the largest school districts in the United States. Operated across a large enterprise environment with complex network segmentation across a geographically distributed campus.

  • Designed the database schema, built the FastAPI backend, developed the Angular frontend, and managed Docker deployment to a VM — full ownership, end to end
  • Built geographic data visualizations mapping staff tenure across Clark County using SQL Server spatial queries and Highcharts
  • Reduced data request fulfillment from months to days via custom ETL pipelines and a unified data layer
  • Integrated Highcharts for dynamic leadership tracking dashboards with role-based access and PDF report generation
